name: Canevari's Delicatessen & Catering
tagline: Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli — handmade ravioli since 1929
seoDescription: Canevari's Delicatessen & Catering in Santa Rosa has handcrafted Italian ravioli, subs, and catering since 1929 — Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli.

images.heroAlt: Canevari's Delicatessen & Catering in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Handmade Italian, the way Santa Rosa has loved since 1929
sections.subheading: Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli — ravioli made from Attilio Canevari's original recipe, hearty subs, and full-service catering.
badges: Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli, est. 1929

image.alt: Owner Lou Chambrone outside Canevari's in Santa Rosa, holding a fresh Italian plate

sections.heading: Nearly a century of Sonoma County Italian
body: Canevari's was founded in 1929 by Attilio Canevari, a Sonoma County native, as a tiny Santa Rosa ravioli factory. He and Maria Canevari sold their first batch of hand-stuffed pasta that year, and for decades the family supplied their cheese- and meat-filled ravioli to local favorites and supermarkets as far north as Oregon. A deli counter was added in 1970, and Canevari's quickly grew into one of the premier caterers in Sonoma County.

In 2011 Lou Chambrone took over and revived the institution, keeping Attilio's time-honored ravioli recipe while adding homestyle Italian classics — spaghetti and meatballs, the Italian sub, lasagna, polenta, and cannoli. Daily specials still go up in charming hand-lettered signs, and the deli case stays stocked with fresh pasta, salads, and desserts made on-site.
highlights: Sonoma County's oldest Italian deli, est. 1929
Ravioli hand-made from the original Canevari recipe
Scratch Italian subs, lasagna & daily specials

image.alt: The dining room and ravioli case inside Canevari's

items.title: Hand-Made Ravioli
items.description: Cheese, meat, vegetarian, and old-fashioned ravioli stuffed by hand from Attilio's 1929 recipe — by the dozen to take home and cook.

items.title: The Italian Sub
items.description: The deli's signature stacked Italian sub on a fresh roll — one of the sandwiches regulars come back for.

items.title: Meatball Sub
items.description: House meatballs and marinara on a ciabatta roll with provolone, asiago, and french-fried onions.

items.title: Hot Italian Plates
items.description: Lasagna, spaghetti and meatballs, cheese or meat ravioli, and creamy mushroom polenta — comfort plates served with garlic bread.

items.title: Salads & Sides
items.description: Lou's chopped salad, Caesar, house mix, plus potato, macaroni, and orange-fennel cole slaw by the pound.

items.title: Full-Service Catering
items.description: Trays of ravioli, meatballs, salads, and Italian classics for events of every size — Sonoma County's go-to caterer since 1970.

images.alt: Chicken parmesan sub with a melted cheese pull
Lou's chopped salad beside Italian tomato cans
Hand-made ravioli in pesto with shaved cheese and herbs
Meatball sub topped with marinara, cheese and crispy onions
The Canevari's deli case full of fresh pasta, salads and desserts
Canevari's Italian sub sliced in half on a wood board

items.quote: Sonoma County's Italian history really is in every bite of Canevari's ravioli — the recipe hasn't changed since 1929 and you can taste it.
The meatball sub and the Italian sub are the best in Santa Rosa, and the staff treat you like family every time.

sections.heading: Hungry yet?
sections.body: Find us at 695 Lewis Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95404. Call (707) 545-6941 — we’re glad to help.
